preferred_name: Control and auxiliary circuits for Rotary button

preferred_name_ml.en: Control and auxiliary circuits for Rotary button
preferred_name_ml.fr: Circuits de commande et auxiliaire pour Bouton rotatif
preferred_name_ml.zh: 旋钮的控制和辅助电路

definition: all the conductive parts of the rotary button which are intended to be included in a circuit other than the main circuit

definition_ml.en: all the conductive parts of the rotary button which are intended to be included in a circuit other than the main circuit
definition_ml.fr: ensemble des pièces conductrices du bouton rotatif destinées à être insérées dans un circuit autre que le circuit principal
definition_ml.de: alle leitfähigen Teile eines Drehknopfschalters, die zu anderen Stromkreisen als dem Hauptstromkreis des Geräts gehören
definition_ml.zh: 在主电路之外的电路中使用的旋钮的所有导电部件
